## Checklist before merging

- [ ] `php -l` clean on changed files
- [ ] `node --check` clean on changed JS
- [ ] PHPUnit passes (`vendor/bin/phpunit`)
- [ ] Manual keyboard walkthrough on affected pages
- [ ] Lighthouse Performance mobile >= 85 unchanged
- [ ] No new placeholders (`{{`, `TODO`, `FIXME`, `lorem`)
- [ ] Brand palette contract still holds (no new hex literals outside `:root`)
